[{'reasoning': "I'll create a SPIR-V fragment shader that renders the Mandelbrot set. The shader will:\n1. Take UV coordinates from location 2\n2. Map UV to complex plane: c = (uv.x*3-2", 'IDs': 'n- 1: OpTypeVoid\n- 2: OpTypeFunction (void)\n- 3: OpTypeFloat 32\n- 4: OpTypeVector float 2\n- 5: OpTypeVector float 3\n- 6: OpTypeVector float 4\n- 7: OpTypePointer Input float2\n- 8: OpTypePointer Input float3\n- 9: OpTypePointer Output float4\n- 10: OpTypeInt 32 unsigned (for loop counter)\n- 11: OpTypePointer Function float (for z components)\n- 12: OpTypePointer Function int\n- 13: uv variable (Input', '14': 'outColor variable (Output', '15': 'main function\n- 16: entry label\n\nActually', 'carefully': 'n\nIDs:\n1 = void type\n2 = func type void(void)\n3 = float32\n4 = vec2\n5 = vec4\n6 = ptr(Input', 'SPIR-V': 'n- Need OpTypeBool\n- Need OpPhi for variables that change across iterations\n- Need OpLoopMerge\n- Use structured control flow\n\nLet me plan the loop structure:\n\n```\nentry:\n  load uv\n  compute cx = uv.x*3 - 2\n  compute cy = uv.y*2 - 1\n  branch -> loop_header\n\nloop_header: (merge=loop_merge', '': '', 'loop_merge\n\nloop_body': 'n  zx2 = zx*zx\n  zy2 = zy*zy  \n  // check escape\n  mag2 = zx2 + zy2\n  escape_now = mag2 > 4.0\n  zx_new = zx2 - zy2 + cx\n  zy_new = 2*zx*zy + cy\n  branch -> loop_continue\n\nloop_continue:\n  // This is the continue target\n  escaped_new = escaped || escape_now\n  branch -> loop_header\n\nloop_merge:\n  // compute t = float(i) / 20.0\n  t = ...\n  // output color\n  branch -> end\n```\n\nHmm', 'is': 'iterate until escape OR max iterations. With OpPhi I can track the count at which escape happened.\n\nAlternatively', 'track': 'n- escaped: bool phi\n- iter_count: int phi (the iteration at which we escaped', 'simpler': 'just count how many iterations we did before escaping. Use i as the count', 'restructure': 'n- header: phi', 'header\n\nheader': 'n  zx = phi(0.0 from entry', 'merge\n\nbody': 'n  zx_new = zx2 - zy2 + cx\n  zy_new = 2*zx*zy + cy\n  branch -> continue_block\n\ncontinue_block:\n  i1 = i + 1\n  branch -> header\n\nmerge:\n  t_int = i  // number of iterations completed\n  t = float(t_int) / 20.0\n  r = t\n  g = t * 0.5\n  b = 1.0 - t\n  color = vec4(r', 'be': [0.0, 'from entry', 'zx_new from body'], 'reference': 'entry (for initial values) and continue_block (for loop-back values). But zx_new is computed in body', 'either': 'n1. Compute zx_new in continue_block', 'approach': 'put all computation in the continue_block (which is also the loop body effectively)', 'body': 'do the Mandelbrot step computation\n- continue_block: i++', 'Options': "n1. Use OpPhi in continue_block to relay the value (but continue_block's predecessor is body", 'continue_block': 'n\n```\nentry:\n  ... compute cx'}, [1], [-1, 1],
